channel.title: AI Market Intel
channel.description: Your weekly intelligence briefing on AI and content creation. No hype. No jargon. Just curated insights for busy content marketers and SMB professionals. Hosted by Lonnie Rodriguez of Q'd Up Agency.
channel.itunes:title: AI Market Intel
channel.itunes:subtitle: Curated, Not Overwhelming
channel.itunes:author: Lonnie Rodriguez
channel.itunes:summary: Your weekly intelligence briefing on AI and content creation. No hype. No jargon. Just curated insights for busy content marketers and SMB professionals. Hosted by Lonnie Rodriguez of Q'd Up Agency.

item.title: Google Just Beat Claude & GPT-5 — At the Same Price
item.description:
Gemini 3.1 Pro doubles reasoning at zero extra cost. Canva now lives inside Claude & ChatGPT. Google Lyria 3 brings free custom music to Gemini.

Topics: Gemini 3.1 Pro, Canva AI, Google Lyria 3

Full show notes, timestamps & sources →
item.itunes:title: Google Just Beat Claude & GPT-5 — At the Same Price
item.itunes:summary: Gemini 3.1 Pro doubles reasoning at zero extra cost. Canva now lives inside Claude & ChatGPT. Google Lyria 3 brings free custom music to Gemini.

item.title: AI Video Copyright Crisis + ChatGPT vs Claude Battle
item.description:
Disney sent a cease-and-desist to ByteDance. OpenAI and Anthropic took their rivalry to the Super Bowl.

Topics: Disney vs ByteDance, GPT-5.3 Codex, Claude Opus 4.6

Full show notes, timestamps & sources →
item.itunes:title: AI Video Copyright Crisis + ChatGPT vs Claude Battle
item.itunes:summary: Disney sent a cease-and-desist to ByteDance. OpenAI and Anthropic took their rivalry to the Super Bowl.

item.title: Kling 3.0 Beats Sora 2: AI Video Just Changed
item.description:
Kling 3.0 is now the highest-rated AI video generator. ChatGPT launched ads. Seedance 2.0 might be the DeepSeek moment for AI video.

Topics: Kling 3.0, ChatGPT Ads, Seedance 2.0

Full show notes, timestamps & sources →
item.itunes:title: Kling 3.0 Beats Sora 2: AI Video Just Changed
item.itunes:summary: Kling 3.0 is now the highest-rated AI video generator. ChatGPT launched ads. Seedance 2.0 might be the DeepSeek moment for AI video.

item.title: OpenClaw AI Agent Warning + Apple Undercuts Adobe 85%
item.description:
AI crossed a line — it stopped being an assistant and became an agent. OpenClaw went viral with 116K GitHub stars.

Topics: OpenClaw, Apple Creator Studio, PixVerse R1

item.itunes:title: OpenClaw AI Agent Warning + Apple Undercuts Adobe 85%
item.itunes:summary: AI crossed a line — it stopped being an assistant and became an agent. OpenClaw went viral with 116K GitHub stars.

item.title: Google Stole 18% of AI Market in One Week
item.description:
Google Gemini captured 18% of global AI traffic. ChatGPT is adding ads. DeepSeek offers frontier intelligence for 90% less.

item.itunes:title: Google Stole 18% of AI Market in One Week
